query:
-- using 1778893095 as a seed to the RNG

explain analyze
select
	sum(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue
from
	lineitem
where
	l_shipdate >= date '1997-01-01'
	and l_shipdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year
	and l_discount between 0.04 - 0.01 and 0.04 + 0.01
	and l_quantity < 25
